news.headline: Oil resumes rally as Iran reportedly wants to keep enriched uranium within the country
news.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader directs near-weapons-grade uranium stay in country, complicating US peace talks. IEA warns of 'red zone' oil crisis this summer.

news.headline: SoftBank extends scorching rally, surging over 12%, as investors crowd into AI trade
news.summary: SoftBank shares +12% on Friday, adding to Thursday's 20% surge. Powered by Arm (+16%) and Nvidia earnings. OpenAI IPO unlock value.

news.headline: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment
news.summary: Microsoft $5B investment spurs Anthropic chip partnership discussions.

news.headline: Stocks tread water — but a wave of volatility is building
news.summary: MarketWatch notes S&P choppy despite AI momentum; bonds sending mixed signals.

news.headline: Asian Stocks Rise on Optimism Over US-Iran Talks: Markets Wrap
news.summary: Asia broadly higher as Trump says Iran negotiations in 'final stage'.

news.headline: Eli Lilly says next-generation weight loss drug clears crucial obesity trial
news.summary: Retatrutide clears key obesity trial; significant pharma sector catalyst.

news.headline: Global buyout funds to exit China's data centres with final $1bn deal
news.summary: Private equity exits China data center market with final $1B transaction.

summary: 隔夜美股窄幅震荡，纳指受Nvidia/AI继续推高+1.6%。日股SoftBank连续两日暴涨带动Nikkei+2.8%。油价因伊朗铀浓缩问题重回涨势，WTI $97.8 Brent $104.5。IEA警告今夏石油'红色警戒'。亚洲盘普遍上涨受美伊谈判乐观情绪提振。关注A股开盘能否跟随外围反弹。
